settings.title: Five Years and a Hundred First Dances
settings.excerpt: This month Everafter quietly passed its hundredth wedding, and we have been a little emotional about it.
settings.body:
Five years ago we planned our first wedding for a couple who took a chance on a brand new name. This month we passed our hundredth.

A hundred first dances, a hundred sets of nervous parents, more happy tears than we could count. Every one of them taught us something we carried into the next.

A hundred days, a hundred lessons

No two of those weddings were alike, but the things that made them work turned out to be remarkably consistent. After a hundred of them, a few truths are hard to argue with.

  • The calmest days are the ones planned with room to breathe.
  • Couples remember the small private moments, not the big set pieces.
  • Good vendors who trust each other matter more than any budget.

To mark it, we are donating a full day of free planning to a couple facing a serious illness who want to marry sooner than they planned. After a hundred joyful days, it feels right to help make one more happen.

Thank you

We are a small operation, and we have only reached a hundred because couples trusted us with one of the biggest days of their lives. That is not lost on us.

So this milestone is really yours, all hundred of you. Here is to the next stretch, and to the couple whose day we get to help make happen because of everything the first hundred taught us.
